title: Mir Task State Schema
description: A user-given unit of work. May span multiple runs (retries). Holds the 5-element declaration (start-harness output) and run history.

status.description: Task-level status. Multiple runs map under one task.

required_reads.description: Files/docs that must be read before ACT begins (5-element declaration).

required_tools.description: Allowed tools for this task (5-element declaration).

required_checks.description: Verification steps required before DONE (5-element declaration).

report_contract.description: Name of the report_contract this task must satisfy (see phase-6-observability.md §9). Examples: concise_report_v1, audit_report_v1.

runs.description: ULIDs of run_state entries belonging to this task.

created.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of task creation.

updated.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of last update.

completed_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of COMPLETED status. Required if status == COMPLETED.

design_doc_ref.description: Path to design_doc artifact (docs/decisions/adr-*.md OR docs/harness-engineering/phase-*.md) — R10-R1  per ADR-33. Required when task_type=code_execution AND risk_level in {medium, high}. design-complete-gate.sh hook (R11)  enforce.

task_subtype.description: 8-way sliding window subtype lookup (phase-3-memory-context.md §8-1). Optional — maps to task_type via the same §8-1 table. R10-R1 .

sliding_window_n.description: Sliding window turn count for context retention (phase-3 §8-1). Derived from task_subtype lookup. R10-R1 .

origin_session_id.description: Optional ULID of the Session this Task originated in. Per phase-4-5tier-execution-units.md.
